# repliers

> Real-time real estate data API for North America. Provides listings search, location data, building info, agent/client management, saved searches, market estimates, messaging, favorites, webhooks, and NLP-powered natural language search.

Base URL: https://api.repliers.io
Auth: API key via `REPLIERS-API-KEY` header

## Listings

- POST /listings: Listings Search
- GET /listings/{mlsNumber}: Get a single listing
- GET /listings/{mlsNumber}/similar: Get similar listings
- GET /listings/history: Get address history
- GET /listings/deleted: Get deleted listings

## Locations

- GET /locations: Search locations
- GET /locations/autocomplete: Locations autocomplete

## Buildings

- POST /buildings: Buildings Search
- GET /buildings/{addressKey}: Get a single building

## Nlp

- POST /nlp: New Prompt
- GET /nlp: Filter prompts
- GET /nlp/chats: Filter sessions

## Agents

- POST /agents: Create an agent
- GET /agents: Filter agents
- PATCH /agents/{agentId}: Update an agent
- DELETE /agents/{agentId}: Delete an agent
- GET /agents/{agentId}: Get an agent
- POST /agents/{agentId}/transfer: Transfer an agent's clients

## Clients

- POST /clients: Create a client
- GET /clients: Filter clients
- PATCH /clients/{clientId}: Update a client
- DELETE /clients/{clientId}: Delete a client
- GET /clients/{clientId}: Get a client
- GET /clients/tags: Get tags
- PATCH /clients/tags/{tag}: Rename a tag

## Searches

- POST /searches: Create a saved search
- GET /searches: Filter saved searches
- PATCH /searches/{searchId}: Update a saved search
- DELETE /searches/{searchId}: Delete a saved search
- GET /searches/{searchId}: Get a saved search
- GET /searches/{searchId}/matches: Filter matches
- GET /searches/{searchId}/matches/{matchId}: Get a match
- PATCH /searches/{searchId}/matches/{matchId}: Update a match

## Estimates

- POST /estimates: Create an estimate
- GET /estimates: Get Estimates
- PATCH /estimates/{estimateId}: Update an estimate
- DELETE /estimates/{estimateId}: Delete an estimate

## Messages

- POST /messages: Send a message
- GET /messages: Filter messages
- GET /messages/{messageId}: Get a message

## Favorites

- POST /favorites: Add a favorite
- GET /favorites: Get favorites
- DELETE /favorites/{favoriteId}: Delete a favorite

## Webhooks

- POST /webhooks: Create a subscription
- GET /webhooks: List subscriptions
- PATCH /webhooks/{webhookId}: Update a subscription
- DELETE /webhooks/{webhookId}: Delete a subscription
- GET /webhooks/{webhookId}: Get a subscription
- GET /webhooks/events: List events

## Members

- GET /members: Members

## Offices

- GET /offices: Offices

## Brokerages

- GET /brokerages: Brokerages

## Places

- GET /places: Places
